testcase.name: test_invite_email_failure_returns_setup_url

failure.message: Failed: BUG: send_email swallows Resend errors so sent always True. Response: {'ok': True, 'sent': True, 'email': 'invite-test@example.com', 'expires_at': '2026-07-03T22:12:19.872905+00:00', 'setup_url_if_email_failed': None, 'message': 'Invite emailed to invite-test@example.com. Link expires in 7 days.'}
